properties.Test Case: unplug internet during download of updates. Not too picky about exactly what it does in this edge case, but: it shouldn't crash. It shouldn't be left in a state where updates won't work when re-connected. Hopefully it should give a helpful message.

properties.Test Case: [5.6] Error during installation when machine is in Dutch (JT 6.3: used https://xupefei.github.io/Locale-Emulator/, set app profile for installer exe to Dutch and told it to fake system UI language. Installer ran normally, but did not get the expected UI asking which localization to use. Tried using it on BloomBetaInternal.exe, but no context menu item: Locale Emulator does not handle 64-bit exes. Tried Locale Remulator, which does. Fiddled with LFConfig.xml to add Dutch, since its UI for configuration does not work. Tried running Bloom supposedly set to Dutch. No crash, but no UI asking me to choose locale. Tried built-in Run in Japanese. Same result. Don't think this is worth more effort, so checking off.)
properties.Steps: [5.6] Error during installation when machine is in Dutch (JT 6.3: used https://xupefei.github.io/Locale-Emulator/, set app profile for installer exe to Dutch and told it to fake system UI language. Installer ran normally, but did not get the expected UI asking which localization to use. Tried using it on BloomBetaInternal.exe, but no context menu item: Locale Emulator does not handle 64-bit exes. Tried Locale Remulator, which does.
